channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran citizen held in France over pro-Palestine comments returns home
item.description: Release of Mahdieh Esfandiari comes a week after Iran released two French citizens held on espionage charges.

item.title: North Korea boosting ability to manufacture nuclear arms, IAEA chief warns
item.description: The nuclear watchdog's chief says there is a rapid increase in operations at North Korea's Yongbyon reactor.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 47 of the US-Iran conflict?
item.description: US President Donald Trump has signalled a possible second round of talks with Iran in the coming days.

item.title: Trump turns on Meloni, saying she lacks ‘courage’ over US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: The US president says he is 'shocked at her', delivering a blunt public rebuke to one of his closest European allies.

item.title: China’s Xi meets Russian FM Lavrov, calls relations with Moscow ‘precious’
item.description: Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov met with top Chinese leadership to discuss the Iran war and other concerns.

item.title: Iran says $270bn war loss must be compensated, as fresh talks with US loom
item.description: Iran demands compensation for war damages caused by US and Israeli attacks on critical infrastructure.

item.title: US military says blockade of Iran ports ‘completely’ halts economic trade
item.description: US Central Command say more than 10,000 armed forces members, as well as warships and planes, are involved in blockade.

item.title: US forces kill 4 people in latest strike on vessels in eastern Pacific
item.description: The killings mark the fourth US deadly strike in the past four days on vessels in the eastern Pacific Ocean.

item.title: Israeli attacks kill 11, including two children, in day of strikes on Gaza
item.description: A three-year-old and a 14-year-old were among those killed in Israel's latest strikes on northern Gaza.

item.title: Haiti’s Culture Ministry fires workers over citadel stampede that killed 25
item.description: At least nine people have been arrested following the stampede, including police officers and ministry employees.
